description: Extract troubleshooting information and Tor daemon logs from Tor Browser's internal UI to create a diagnostic package. Save the troubleshooting data from about:support to /home/ga/Documents/about_support.txt and the Tor daemon logs from the connection settings to /home/ga/Documents/tor_logs.txt. Filter the logs for lines containing the case-sensitive word 'Bootstrapped' and save them to /home/ga/Documents/bootstrap_phases.txt. Compress all three files into a single archive at /home/ga/Documents/tor_diagnostics.zip.
